creator: vovan@hosix.ntu-kpi.kiev.ua
text:
I've PCI Maestro-1 (es1948f) chip based soundcard. I'm using "device pcm"
in kernel. When I start playing mp3 with mpg123(Version 0.59r) or another
player, the music playing for 20-30 sec and then the system hangs up
without any messages in log.

How-To-Repeat: Every time.
